Trover Saves The Universe

You are the Chairorpian, tasked with rescuing your dogs from the mad Glorkon who has imprisoned them in his eye sockets! Control Trover, a purple eye-hole monster, as you traverse bizarre alien worlds filled with platforms, enemies, and cosmic challenges. Collect power gems to upgrade abilities, defeat Glorkon's minions, and ultimately face the beaked lunatic himself to save your dogs and the universe. Navigate through three increasingly dangerous worlds, each with unique enemies and environmental hazards.

Arrow Keys: Move left/right and jump | Space: Fire energy blast attack | Z: Activate special dash ability (unlocked after collecting power gems) | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart to title screen

Trover Saves The Universe

You are the Chairorpian, tasked with rescuing your dogs from the mad Glorkon who has imprisoned them in his eye sockets! Control Trover, a purple eye-hole monster, as you traverse bizarre alien worlds filled with platforms, enemies, and cosmic challenges. Collect power gems to upgrade abilities, defeat Glorkon's minions, and ultimately face the beaked lunatic himself to save your dogs and the universe. Navigate through three increasingly dangerous worlds, each with unique enemies and environmental hazards.

Arrow Keys: Move left/right and jump | Space: Fire energy blast attack | Z: Activate special dash ability (unlocked after collecting power gems) | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart to title screen
